title: heterotheca sessiliflora subsp. fastigiata
intro: Heterotheca sessiliflora subsp. fastigiata, also known as greenthread, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe and calm skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of greenthread include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and antiviral properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Greenthread can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
